Container.Name: broccoli_open-notebook
Container.Overview: Privacy-focused NotebookLM alternative. Uses upstream v1-latest image with separated SurrealDB and starts Open Notebook MCP in the same container. Exposes Web UI on 8502, API on 5055, and MCP Streamable HTTP on 5056 (/mcp). Persist /app/data and keep OPEN_NOTEBOOK_ENCRYPTION_KEY stable across upgrades so provider credentials and model settings survive updates.
Container.PostArgs: -lc "set -u; export OPEN_NOTEBOOK_URL=${OPEN_NOTEBOOK_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:5055}; export OPEN_NOTEBOOK_PASSWORD=${OPEN_NOTEBOOK_PASSWORD:-}; export MCP_TRANSPORT=streamable-http; export HOST=0.0.0.0; export PORT=${OPEN_NOTEBOOK_MCP_PORT:-5056}; export MCP_PATH=/mcp; echo '[startup] Open Notebook supervisord starting (api, worker, frontend)...'; /usr/bin/supervisord -c /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf &; SUP_PID=$!; i=0; API_HEALTHY=0; while [ $i -lt 60 ]; do if ! kill -0 $SUP_PID 2>/dev/null; then echo '[startup] supervisord exited before API became healthy'; exit 1; fi; if curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:5055/health >/dev/null 2>&1; then API_HEALTHY=1; echo '[startup] Open Notebook API healthy at http://127.0.0.1:5055'; break; fi; i=$((i+1)); sleep 1; done; if [ $API_HEALTHY -ne 1 ]; then echo '[startup] Open Notebook API health check timed out after 60s; MCP startup aborted'; exit 1; fi; if ! kill -0 $SUP_PID 2>/dev/null; then echo '[startup] supervisord exited before MCP startup'; exit 1; fi; echo "[startup] Open Notebook MCP starting at http://0.0.0.0:${PORT}${MCP_PATH} (target API: ${OPEN_NOTEBOOK_URL})"; exec uvx open-notebook-mcp"

Config.Name: Open Notebook MCP Port
Config.Description: Container Port: 5056 (MCP Streamable HTTP endpoint at /mcp)

Config.Name: Encryption Key
Config.Description: Required. Use a cryptographically random secret (recommended 32+ chars).

Config.Name: API URL (Reverse Proxy)
Config.Description: Optional. Set when Open Notebook is served behind a reverse proxy/domain (for example: https://notebook.example.com).

Config.Name: Open Notebook Password
Config.Description: Optional. Set a password to protect the Open Notebook UI. The bundled MCP server reuses this value to authenticate to the local Open Notebook API.

Config.Name: Open Notebook Internal URL
Config.Description: URL used by the bundled MCP server to reach Open Notebook API.

Config.Name: Open Notebook MCP Internal Port
Config.Description: Internal MCP server port (streamable_http). If you change this, also change the Open Notebook MCP Port mapping above or MCP will listen on a different internal port than the exposed container port.

Config.Name: SurrealDB URL
Config.Description: SurrealDB WebSocket endpoint. Default assumes a user-defined Docker network with DB alias surrealdb. If not using a user-defined network (default bridge), change to ws://<unraid-ip>:8000/rpc.

Config.Name: SurrealDB Password
Config.Description: SurrealDB password (must match your SurrealDB service)

Config.Name: Embedding Batch Size
Config.Description: Optional. Lower (for example 8) for CPU-only local providers or stricter OpenAI-compatible embeddings.

Config.Name: Surreal Max Tasks
Config.Description: Optional. Reduce (for example 2) if SurrealDB reports too many concurrent commands.

Config.Name: CORS Origins
Config.Description: Optional. Comma-separated allowed origins for API requests. Set this for reverse-proxy/public deployments.
